mapper.sql: a.id AS "id", a.name AS "name", a.kind_id AS "kind.id", a.remarks AS "remarks", a.create_by_id AS "createBy.id", a.create_time AS "createTime", a.update_by_id AS "updateBy.id", a.update_time AS "updateTime", a.del_flag AS "delFlag", kind.name AS "kind.name"
LEFT JOIN test_car_kind kind ON kind.id = a.kind_id
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM test_car a
WHERE a.id = #{id} and a.del_flag = 0
